articles.title: ‘Normalise career breaks’: Techie quits LinkedIn, takes 1-year off to travel, returns to join Meta
articles.description: Taking a year off work to travel and rest seemed risky, but it paid off for this techie. His comeback to a top tech giant has sparked debate online about burnout and career breaks.

articles.title: Pune to develop 9 km road to connect Mumbai-Satara highway to Pune-Solapur highways
articles.description: The PMC has now allocated Rs 34 crore to carry out surveys, prepare detailed land acquisition proposals, and on-site planning for the development of 9 km long and 60 meter wide.

articles.title: Equitas Small Finance Bank Q4 profit soars 5-fold on expansion, asset quality
articles.description: Equitas Small Finance Bank's net profit surged five times to Rs 213 crore in the fourth quarter. This growth was fueled by expanded business and better asset quality. Provisions also decreased significantly. The bank saw its net interest margin improve. Gross advances grew by 22 percent year-on-year. Non-performing assets reduced, and credit costs declined.

articles.title: Buddha Purnima 2026 Bank Holiday: Are banks open or closed on May 1? Check details
articles.description: Bank Holiday on Buddha Purnima 2026: Even though banks will remain closed on national or public holidays, digital banking services will be available to the public 24/7. Services such as UPI, net banking, and ATMs will continue without any disturbance.

articles.title: Huge PF boost: EPFO plans 7.5x hike in minimum pension under EPS-95
articles.description: EPFO is considering major reforms including a minimum pension hike under EPS-95 up to Rs 7,500, ATM-based PF withdrawals, and a new e-PRAPTI portal for inactive accounts.

articles.title: Meta loses 20 million users across WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram and Messenger: Here’s what the company is blaming for this drop
articles.description: Meta reported a loss of 20 million daily active users across its apps, attributing the decline to geopolitical factors in Iran and Russia. Despite this user dip, the company is significantly increasing its AI investment to between $125 billion and $145 billion for 2026, while also undergoing workforce reductions and facing legal challenges regarding youth safety.

articles.title: DoT trims Vodafone Idea AGR dues to Rs 64,046 crore, allows staggered payments
articles.description: The Department of Telecommunications (DoT) has finalised the AGR dues of Vodafone Idea Limited at ₹64,046 crore as of December 31, 2025, lower than the earlier estimate of ₹87,695 crore, following directions from the Supreme Court of India.

articles.title: Markets fall as oil spikes on US-Iran crisis, but post strong monthly gains
articles.description: Sensex, Nifty decline amid surge in crude prices and geopolitical tensions, though benchmarks post strong April gains despite concerns over inflation and growth

articles.title: IDBI Bank's Q4 FY26 results: Net profit declines 5% to ₹1,943 crore
articles.description: Bank reports decline in profit due to weak non-interest income, even as net interest income rises and asset quality and capital adequacy improve

articles.title: EPFO Kukatpally issues PPOs to retiring employees under a new initiative
articles.description: EPFO Kukatpally distributes Pension Payment Orders to retiring employees under the PRAYAAS initiative, ensuring timely pension delivery.

articles.title: Pak Petroleum Minister Ali Malik Explains How India Avoided Oil Shock, But Islamabad Didn’t
articles.description: Pakistan had earlier announced a PKR 80 per litre increase in petrol prices, but later withdrew hike due to public protests.

articles.title: Acutaas Chemicals consolidated net profit rises 110.88% in the March 2026 quarter
Newgen Software Technologies consolidated net profit declines 1.88% in the March 2026 quarter
Shakti Pumps India secures solar pump order from MSEDCL
articles.description: Shakti Pumps India announced that it has received a Letter of Empanelment from Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company (MSEDCL) for the supply and installation of 6,580 off-grid solar photovoltaic water pumping systems across the state.

articles.title: Supreme Court takes suo motu cognisance of delay in approval of resolution plans by NCLT
articles.description: A resolution plan is a statutory proposal under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (IBC) designed to revive a distressed company (corporate debtor) through restructuring or takeover

articles.title: Wipro is buying back shares at Rs 250. What your tax bill looks like depends on this factor
articles.description: Wipro's share buy-back offers Rs 250 per share, a premium over market price. New tax rules effective April 1, 2026, treat buy-back proceeds as capital gains. This makes tendering shares more tax-efficient for both promoters and non-promoters compared to selling on the open market.

articles.title: W.O.R.R is the worry. A four-way assault pummells Indian macro
articles.description: India faces a rare convergence of four macro shocks—war-driven oil surge, a record weak rupee, and a likely poor monsoon—raising inflation and growth risks. The Finance Ministry warns these interacting pressures could strain external balances and policy choices, even as strong domestic demand and financial resilience provide a partial buffer.

articles.title: OpenAI lawsuit: Elon Musk criticises Microsoft’s role and $10 billion backing
articles.description: Elon Musk questioned Microsoft’s $10 billion OpenAI investment in court, saying such funding implies expected returns while raising concerns about corporate influence over artificial general intelligence development.

articles.title: After Vedanta demerger, should you consider adding stock to your portfolio?
articles.description: Vedanta: The demerger will be executed as a simple vertical split -- one share of each company for every share of Vedanta held. The move will result in the creation and subsequent listing of four new entities on the stock exchanges.

articles.title: 70% Indians say retiring financially secure is 'unachievable': Report
articles.description: Holidays take precedence over pensions, marking growing tension between lifestyle and long-term security goals

articles.title: Two-wheelers, defence, Bajaj Finance: Narendra Solanki's top calls as Q4 results roll in
articles.description: Narendra Solanki of Anand Rathi Shares & Stock Brokers guides investors on current market trends. He highlights durable companies in autos, banks, defence, and NBFCs. Solanki suggests focusing on two-wheelers and commercial vehicles in autos. He advises caution with Bandhan Bank but favors ICICI Bank and Axis Bank. Defence stocks require a long-term view.

articles.title: Why Is Vedanta Stock Down By 65% Today? Know About Demerger, Price Discovery, Impact On Shareholders
articles.description: Shares of Vedanta trade at Rs 502.1 apiece on the NSE in the opening trade, which is 64.9 per cent lower than the previous close of Rs 773.6.

articles.title: Vedanta's 65% share price crash an illusion, the stock is down just 5%. Here's why
articles.description: Vedanta shares adjusted significantly post-demerger, appearing to crash but actually declining 5% as four entities (Aluminium, Power, Oil & Gas, Steel) were separated. This restructuring aims to unlock shareholder value by allowing independent businesses to be valued more fairly. The demerger, approved by NCLT, sees the base metals business remain with a restructured Vedanta, while new entities will list separately.

articles.title: Alphabet’s Google revenue jumps 22%, Google Cloud crosses $20 billion milestone
articles.description: The strong quarter was driven by AI-powered features in Google Search, with search revenue grew 19%, said Google CEO Sundar Pichai.

articles.title: Dhan launches Gold Vault Enables Indians to buy Gold & Silver directly from Exchange
articles.description: Bangalore : Dhan, one of India’s fastest growing trading & investing platforms, announced the launch of ‘Gold Vault’ – a first-of-its-kind investment product that allows every Indian investor to buy physical Gold & Silver at live prices traded on stock exchanges. Gold Vault by Dhan operates entirely within SEBI’s capital markets regulatory framework, giving investors [...] The post Dhan launches Gold Vault Enables Indians to buy Gold & Silver directly from Exchange appeared first on FM Live .

articles.title: '69 million barrels Iran can’t sell': After 2 weeks of US naval blockade in Hormuz, what next?
articles.description: US Central Command reports 41 tankers carrying 69 million barrels of oil are blocked from offloading due to US enforcement measures, cutting off Iranian trade. President Trump has directed aides to prepare for an extended blockade, viewing it as a high-risk, effective strategy to pressure Tehran on its nuclear program.

articles.title: 'No Well Exploded': Iran Taunts Trump, Warns Oil Prices Could Climb to $140
articles.description: Iran has responded to Donald Trump's threats regarding its oil infrastructure with mockery, emphasising that no oil wells have exploded despite his claims.

articles.title: Why market fell today? Sensex slumps 583 pts, Nifty below 24,000; 7 key triggers
articles.description: Indian stock markets experienced a significant downturn on Thursday, with Sensex and Nifty both falling over 0.7%. This decline was driven by soaring oil prices, a record low for the rupee, and other factors that negatively impacted investor sentiment.

articles.title: 'We regret any offense caused': Nepal Airlines apologises, removes post showing J&K as part of Pakistan in ‘network map’
articles.description: Jammu Kashmir map: Nepal Airlines apologises after social media post showed J&K as part of Pakistan, triggering backlash. Carrier deletes post, orders review, says error does not reflect Nepal’s official stance and values regional ties amid outrages

articles.title: Reversal of year-end bulge in deposits & advances points to window dressing
articles.description: India Business News: Mumbai: Banking data for the fortnight ended April 15, 2026 showed a sharp contraction in deposits and advances after a surge at the March 31 year-end.

articles.title: Trump tariff refunds may finally be in sight as first payouts expected by May 11
articles.description: The Trump administration is set to issue its first tariff refunds around May 11, following the Supreme Court's ruling that the sweeping duties were illegal. A new process, CAPE, is handling the refunds, with approximately 3% of affected entries already in the payment stage. This process could cover billions in duties paid by hundreds of thousands of importers.

articles.title: Oil prices extend gains as US-Iran war deadlock keeps supply off market
articles.description: Oil prices extended gains as concerns mount over prolonged supply disruptions from the Middle East due to the U.S.-Iran conflict. Talks to end the war have deadlocked, with the Strait of Hormuz remaining largely blocked. The UAE's withdrawal from OPEC is also expected to impact the group's price control ability.

articles.title: Amazon Q1 Results: Higher Spending Reported To Fuel Cloud Unit Sales
articles.description: The spending reduced Amazon's 12-month trailing free cash flow to $1.2 billion at the quarter's end, compared with $25.9 billion a year earlier.

articles.title: GIFT Nifty trades lower, hints at a weak start for Dalal Street
articles.description: Indian markets opened firm on Wednesday, buoyed by global cues and easing geopolitical tensions. However, gains were capped by surging crude oil prices and a weak rupee. Investor sentiment remains cautious ahead of state election exit poll results, with final outcomes expected to add to market volatility.

articles.title: Global oil price retreats after hitting 4-year high on concern of US-Iran war escalation
articles.description: LONDON, April 30 : Global oil prices retreated after hitting a four-year high of more than $126 a barrel on Thursday on concerns that the U.S.-Iran war could worsen and lead to a protracted Middle East oil supply disruption that could hurt global economic growth.Earlier in the day, the market moved higher aft

articles.title: Brent jumps to 4-year high as concerns of US-Iran war escalation
articles.description: April 30 : Brent crude prices jumped to a fresh four-year high on Thursday on concerns that the U.S.-Iran war could worsen and lead to a protracted Middle East oil supply disruption that could hurt global economic growth. Brent crude futures rose $4.28, or 3.63 per cent, to $122.31 a barrel as of 0659 GMT

articles.title: Powerball winning numbers for April 29: Did anyone win $143 million jackpot on Wednesday night?
articles.description: The Powerball jackpot has climbed to an estimated $143 million for the April 29 drawing, with no winner confirmed yet. Players have until 9:59 PM ET in most states to purchase tickets for the next drawing on May 2. Winners can choose between an annuity or a lump-sum cash payout.

articles.title: Karnataka: RTC staffers to launch strike from May 20
articles.description: RTC strike: Karnataka transport staff plan indefinite strike from May 20 over pay hike and arrears dispute, rejecting 7% offer and demanding 25% raise, as talks with government fail and unions cite discrimination

articles.description: Region-wise, Pune continues to remain the most stressed, with storage at 32.99%, though marginally higher than last year’s 28.64%
